{"code":"prs = github.list_pull_requests(state="open")
total_count = len(prs)

# Group by repository
from collections import Counter
repo_counts = Counter(p["repo"] for p in prs)
most_repo = repo_counts.most_common(1)[0]

(total_count, most_repo[0], most_repo[1])"}
